zh.lifeSummary: Henry De Appleby I是Walter De Appleby I的兒子，於1125年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿波萊比 馬尼亞。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1150年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿波萊比 馬尼亞享年25歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Appleby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, and Cumbria, named from Old English æppel or Old Norse epli ‘apple’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry De Appleby I was born in 1125, in Appleby Magna, Leicestershire, England as the son of Walter De Appleby I. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1150, in Appleby Magna, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry De Appleby Iは1125年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアップレビー マグナでWalter De Appleby Iの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1150年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアップレビー マグナで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry De Appleby I(은)는 1125년 영국 레이스스터실르 애플레비 매그나에서 Walter De Appleby I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애플레비 매그나에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry De Appleby I родился в 1125 г. в местности эпплеби магна, лисестиршир, Англия. Его отца звали Walter De Appleby I. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1150 г. в местности эпплеби магна, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет.
